description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa featuring a minimalist design with a light wood frame and clean, straight lines. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a smooth, white fabric, providing a crisp and contemporary appearance. The sofa has two individual back cushions and a single, wide seat cushion, both of which appear to be firmly padded for comfort. The armrests are constructed from the same light wood as the base, forming a rectangular, open-sided structure that extends from the seat to just above the cushion height. The back of the sofa is framed with horizontal wooden slats, adding visual interest and structural support. This piece is well-suited for urban outdoor or indoor environments such as parks, public plazas, or modern communal spaces.
description: A modern, minimalist two-seater sofa with a light wood frame and white upholstered cushions. Features clean lines, open rectangular armrests, and a horizontal slatted back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, open wooden armrest and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two individual back cushions, single wide seat cushion, and symmetrical armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the horizontal wooden slats and the full width of the backrest cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two individual back cushions and one single wide seat cushion, all appearing firmly padded and uniform in size; cushions are likely loose but fit snugly within the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, open rectangular armrests made of light wood, extending from the seat to just above cushion height, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No distinct legs are visible; the sofa base is a continuous wooden platform that extends to the floor, giving a block-like, grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two separate, rectangular cushions; the backrest is continuous in structure but visually segmented by the cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid white with a smooth, untextured finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
